context: Tests whether the agent produces a smoke test automation script that correctly implements all the verification steps from the skill: git commit identification, vercel CLI deployment inspection, HTTP canary checks with proper curl flags and routes, x-vercel-error header check, and correct failure conditions.

checklist.name: git rev-parse usage
checklist.description: Script uses `git rev-parse --short HEAD` (or equivalent) to identify the expected commit SHA

checklist.name: vercel ls for deployments
checklist.description: Script uses `vercel ls` or equivalent Vercel REST API call to list recent deployments

checklist.name: vercel inspect usage
checklist.description: Script uses `vercel inspect <deployment-url>` to check deployment details

checklist.name: READY state check
checklist.description: Script checks that deployment state is READY (not BUILDING, ERROR, or CANCELED)

checklist.name: Commit SHA comparison
checklist.description: Script compares the deployment's git commit SHA against the local HEAD SHA and treats a mismatch as a failure finding

checklist.name: curl flags for HTTP canary
checklist.description: Script uses curl with -sS -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" (or equivalent flags) for canary HTTP checks

checklist.name: Home page canary
checklist.description: Script performs a canary check against the root / path of the production URL

checklist.name: API 401 canary
checklist.description: Script performs a canary check against an /api/v1/* route (e.g. /api/v1/me) WITHOUT a bearer token, expecting a 401 response (not 500)

checklist.name: x-vercel-error check
checklist.description: Script checks that the x-vercel-error header is NOT present in responses (to detect Vercel error pages)

checklist.name: 5xx treated as failure
checklist.description: Script treats any 5xx HTTP status code as a failure condition

checklist.name: No /health endpoint URL
checklist.description: Script does NOT attempt to canary a /health, /healthz, or similar invented health endpoint URL

checklist.name: VERCEL_TOKEN support
checklist.description: Script supports VERCEL_TOKEN environment variable for non-interactive use (e.g. used in vercel ls or API call)
